title: post api auth login with valid credentials
description: Test POST /api/auth/login with valid email and password to receive 200 response with ok true and provider insforge, and session cookie set.

title: post api auth login with missing or invalid credentials
description: Test POST /api/auth/login with missing email or password to receive 400 error with message 'email and password are required', and with invalid credentials to receive 401 error 'Invalid credentials'.

title: post api auth delete account with valid user id
description: Test POST /api/auth/delete-account with valid x-user-id header or body.userId to receive 200 response with success true and confirmation message.

title: post api auth delete account without user id
description: Test POST /api/auth/delete-account without x-user-id header or body.userId to receive 401 error 'User ID is required'.

title: post api threads create new thread
description: Test POST /api/threads with optional title to create a new conversation thread and receive 200 response with thread object.

title: post api threads post message with content
description: Test POST /api/threads/:id/messages with valid content to post a message and receive 200 response with message and AI reply, ensuring prompt injection sanitizer is applied.

title: post api threads post message with missing content
description: Test POST /api/threads/:id/messages with empty or missing content to receive 400 error 'Content required'.

title: post api automations create automation with valid data
description: Test POST /api/automations with valid x-user-id header and body containing name, trigger, and instructions to create a new automation and receive 200 response with automation object.

title: post api automations create automation with invalid or missing data
description: Test POST /api/automations without x-user-id header to receive 401 error 'User ID required', and with invalid trigger value to receive 400 'Validation error'.

title: post api automations process automation
description: Test POST /api/automations/process with optional automationId and context to process scheduled or manual automations and receive 200 response with ok true and processed count.
